entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor cv. SPH-280 grown post-rainy season

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A type of clay-rich soil used as the growth medium

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTRE
entities.description: The research facility where the study was conducted

entities.name: UNIRRIGATED
entities.description: A growth condition where no irrigation was provided throughout growth

entities.name: IRRIGATED
entities.description: A growth condition where irrigation was provided for 7 weeks after emergence

entities.name: AMMONIUM SULPHATE
entities.description: A nitrogen fertilizer applied at rates from 0 to 150 kg/ha N

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: The nutrient element provided to the crop to study its effect on biomass and water extraction

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total dry matter of the plant, measured as a function of depth

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH DENSITY
entities.description: The length of roots per unit volume of soil

entities.name: SOIL WATER CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water present in the soil, measured at various depths

entities.name: GRAVIMETRIC MEASUREMENT
entities.description: A method used to measure soil water content to a depth of 0.23 m

entities.name: NEUTRON PROBE
entities.description: A method used to measure soil water content from 0.3 to 1.5 m

entities.name: VOLUMETRIC WATER CONTENT
entities.description: The volume of water per unit volume of soil, described as a negative exponential function of time

entities.name: WATER EXTRACTION
entities.description: The process of water uptake by roots from the soil

entities.name: VAPOUR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the saturation vapor pressure and the actual vapor pressure, used for normalization

entities.name: BIOMASS:WATER RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of dry matter biomass to the amount of water extracted

relationships.description: inversely related to the time constant of
delayed the descent of the extraction front
